text:
The Claymore Mushroom (ジライタケ, Jiraitake—lit. meaning "Land Mine Mushroom") is a species of fungi. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 8 

Appearance

The Claymore Mushroom has a typical mushroom appearance with blotch-like patterns on its cap. 

Behavior

When harmed, the mushroom explodes. It propagates by releasing and spreading a large amount of spores that attach to the immobilized prey/attacker and any nearby creatures. Then, presumably, the spores will paralyze the victim and grow into full mushrooms while consuming their meat. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

Claymore Mushrooms exploded upon contact with some examinees during the First Phase of the 287th Hunter Exam. 

Trivia

It is named after the real-life Claymore mine.
